scripts.android:build: pnpm build && pnpm exec cap sync && sh scripts/patch-aapt2.sh && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: pnpm build && pnpm exec cap sync && sh scripts/patch-aapt2.sh && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:bundle: pnpm build && pnpm exec cap sync && sh scripts/patch-aapt2.sh && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.ios:build: pnpm build && pnpm exec cap sync ios && cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' build 2>&1 || echo 'iOS builds require macOS with Xcode'
scripts.icons:generate: pnpm exec cap add android 2>/dev/null; pnpm exec cap sync 2>/dev/null; echo 'Run cap sync to regenerate platform resources'
scripts.lint: prettier --check src/ && eslint src/ && pnpm exec svelte-check
